title: Cake or Fake?
description: Contestants must determine if realistic-looking objects are cake or fake. What will it be once they cut into it?
altHero: contestant in flame shirt holds up a knife
alt1: host stands near a guy who is strapped down to a vertical, circular wheel
alt2: flame shirt contestant squints to get a better look
alt3: woman helper hands the contestant a knife
alt4: wheel man screams as flame shirt guy approaches him with the knife
tags: game shows with a bit of danger!
